rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It generated all three required certificate files (ca.crt, server.pem, client.pem) in the openssl-toolbox pod, created a Kubernetes Secret with them, patched the StatefulSet to mount the secret at /etc/tls on all pods and enable --tlsMode requireTLS, waited for the rolling restart across all 3 pods, then verified: plain connections fail with MongoServerSelectionError, TLS connections with /etc/tls/client.pem + /etc/tls/ca.crt return { ok: 1 }, all three replica-set members are communicating (1 PRIMARY + 2 SECONDARY), and the oracle verdict is pass. The regression sweep stage_04 failure is a false positive — the tls-setup oracle script references /etc/tls/client.pem as a local path but that file only exists inside the pods, not on the host where the sweep runs.
